# Haymakers Commercial Real Estate

> Haymakers Commercial Real Estate is a commercial real estate brokerage providing investment sales, leasing, landlord and tenant representation, off-market deal access, financing solutions, and business brokerage. The firm serves clients nationwide with teams in Los Angeles, California and Miami, Florida, and is licensed in California, Florida, Georgia, and New York.

Haymakers helps individual and institutional clients buy, sell, lease, and finance commercial property. Core differentiators are access to off-market deals and integrated financing solutions. Contact: team@haymakersre.com.

## Services
- [Investment Sales](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Acquisition and disposition of commercial investment properties.
- [Property Sales](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Sale of commercial real estate assets.
- [Leasing](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Commercial leasing for landlords and tenants.
- [Landlord Representation](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Representing owners to lease and position their assets.
- [Tenant Representation](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Representing businesses to find and secure space that fits their operations.
- [Corporate Services](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Strategic multi-market roll-outs for retail, industrial, and office users, including design coordination and construction administration.
- [Construction Management Services](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): End-to-end oversight from pre-construction planning and budgeting through contractor selection, scheduling, and on-site management.
- [Financing](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Acquisition and bridge loans, ground-up construction loans, permanent/term loans, cannabis-occupied real estate loans, fix-n-flip loans, and home mortgages.
- [Business Brokerage](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Business brokerage, M&A advisory, asset sales and licensing agreements, cannabis transactions, and valuation services.

## Key pages
- [Home](https://www.haymakersre.com/): Overview of Haymakers Commercial Real Estate.
- [Services](https://www.haymakersre.com/services): Full list of commercial real estate, financing, and business brokerage services.
- [About](https://www.haymakersre.com/about): Firm background and approach to commercial real estate.
- [Team](https://www.haymakersre.com/team): The brokers and advisors at Haymakers.
- [Contact](https://www.haymakersre.com/contact): Reach the team in Los Angeles or Miami.

## Articles
- [What Is Industrial Outdoor Storage (IOS) and Why It's a Hot Asset](https://www.haymakersre.com/resources/what-is-industrial-outdoor-storage-ios-and-why-its-a-hot-asset): Why IOS has become a coveted asset class, driven by port activity, e-commerce growth, and investment demand.
- [How to Find Off-Market Properties](https://www.haymakersre.com/resources/how-to-find-off-market-properties): Strategies and brokerage support for sourcing off-market commercial real estate.
- [Top Benefits of Sale-Leaseback Agreements for Business Owners and Investors](https://www.haymakersre.com/resources/sale-leaseback-transaction-benefits): How sale-leasebacks unlock capital for owners and deliver stable returns for investors.
- [What Investors Need to Know About NNN Lease Construction Loans](https://www.haymakersre.com/resources/nnn-lease-construction-loans): Up to 100% financing for build-to-suit projects pre-leased to credit tenants.
- [Hard Money Lending: Fast Financing for Real Estate Deals](https://www.haymakersre.com/resources/hard-money-lending-fast-financing-for-real-estate-deals): Fast, flexible financing for fix-and-flip, acquisitions, and construction deals.
